HomePage.title: SimHo
HomePage.description: Trace and manage your work in one place.

Auth.title: Welcome back
Auth.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.
Auth.otpSendError: Could not send OTP. Please try again.
Auth.otpVerifyError: Could not verify OTP. Check the code and try again.
Auth.heroSubtitle: Access real-time blueprints, manage site logistics, and coordinate contractors from a single, unified platform built for modern engineering teams.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

register.title: Create account
register.body: Registration will live here — wire your API next.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.body: Enter your email to reset your password

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.body: Create a strong password for your account
resetPassword.tokenMissing: Reset token missing. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.error: Could not reset password. Please try again.

ApiErrors.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
ApiErrors.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ApiErrors.HTTP_500: The server had a problem. Please try again later.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

map.noAddress: Add address fields to see this location on the map.
map.notFound: Could not place a pin for this address. Add a valid postcode, city, state, and country, or shorten unusual street text.
map.error: Location lookup failed. Try again later.
map.openFullMap: Open full map in new tab
map.openFullMapAria: Open this location on OpenStreetMap in a new tab

settingsNav.title: Settings
settingsNav.hint: Customize theme and accent for this workspace.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Control theme, language, and accent for the dashboard. Accent colors highlight navigation and key actions.
appearance.themeHint: Switch between a bright interface and a dark interface.
appearance.languageHint: Updates all dashboard and settings labels for your account on this device.
appearance.customHint: Use a 6-digit hex value (e.g. #2563eb). Custom accents apply to the sidebar, mobile bar, and accent highlights.

pinStatus.title: Pin statuses
pinStatus.subtitle: Create and manage workflow labels for pins. Colors are used when displaying status chips across the app.
pinStatus.empty: No pin statuses yet. Add one to get started.
pinStatus.emptyDescription: Create workflow labels for pins used across your projects.
pinStatus.loadError: Could not load pin statuses. Try again.
pinStatus.deleteConfirmBody: Pins using this status may need to be updated. This action cannot be undone.

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Create and manage tags used across the app. Colors are shown as chips.
tags.emptyDescription: Create your first tag to organize pin annotations.
tags.loadError: Could not load tags. Try again.
tags.deleteConfirmBody: Pins using this tag may need to be updated. This action cannot be undone.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Invite and manage users in your organization.

quotations.title: Quotations
quotations.subtitle: Create and track quotes linked to clients, sites, and projects. Switch between table and card view.
quotations.emptyDescription: Create your first quotation to capture scope, schedule, and team assignments.

hints.tags: Enter tag IDs separated by commas or spaces (organization tags).
hints.noLevels: No levels returned for this project. Confirm the project levels API path if you need floor selection.
hints.noUsers: No users were returned from the users API. Technician and role fields stay optional.

levels.plotEmptyPins: No priced pins in this plot.

page.createSubtitle: Fill in quotation details and save.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Create and name groups for your catalog (e.g. Materials). Composite items belong to exactly one group.

compositeHint.prefix: To assign catalogue lines to groups, open
compositeHint.suffix: — select rows and move them to a group, or set the group when creating or editing an item.

groups.empty: No groups yet. Create one to organize composite items.
groups.emptyDescription: Create groups to organize your composite item catalog.
groups.loadError: Could not load groups. Try again.
groups.detailLoadError: Could not load group details. Try again.
groups.deleteConfirmBody: Composite items in this group may need to be reassigned. This action cannot be undone.

modal.name: Group name
modal.compositeItemsHint: Pick composite items and add an abbreviation for each one.
modal.atLeastOneCompositeItemError: Select at least one composite item.

page.createSubtitle: Fill in group details and save.
page.editSubtitle: Update group details and save changes.

detail.noItems: No items linked to this group.

compositeItems.title: Composite items
compositeItems.subtitle: Catalog entries linked to a group (e.g. materials). Filter by group, add rows, edit or remove.

groupsHint.suffix: — then pick it in the filter or when adding items.

compositeItems.empty: No composite items yet. Create a group first, then add items here.
compositeItems.emptyDescription: Create composite items and assign them to groups.
